# Packages whose changes justify rebuilding the slim KIWI validation image.
NetworkManager
authselect
bash
ca-certificates
cracklib
glibc
grub
kiwi
libpwquality
lvm2
linux
openresolv
openruyi-release
openruyi-repos
openruyi-systemd-default-preset
openssh
pam
setup
shadow
sudo
system-user-root
systemd
util-linux
which
xfsprogs
